title: Report on the proposed subsidy to CODA (Operations) Limited by Derry City and Strabane District Council
body: "The Subsidy Advice Unit (SAU) has published its report providing advice to Derry City and Strabane District Council concerning the proposed subsidy to CODA (Operations) Limited.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Derry City and Strabane District Council’s assessment of compliance of the proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to CODA (Operations) Limited by Derry City and Strabane District Council case page. "
